events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: The man who kept the beat for the biggest band in the world is 86 today. What's your favourite Ringo moment, on or off the drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May! From astrophysics to stadium rock, he truly is a national treasure. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding stages worldwide. Here's to Mick Jagger, the ultimate rock and roll showman. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV, the first 24-hour music video channel, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony wasn't lost on us! What was your favourite music video from the early days?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming a landmark of Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Still sounds as fresh and rebellious today. What's your standout track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace and Music
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Woodstock Festival, which kicked off 57 years ago today. Three days of peace, love, and incredible music. Which performance would you have loved to see?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: August 16, 2026, marks 49 years since the death of 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost a true icon. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: September 13, 2026, marks 30 years since the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the world lost a voice that defined a generation. Tupac Shakur's impact on music and culture remains undeniable.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: September 18, 2026, marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Forever
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on. His revolutionary guitar playing continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring their final studio recordings together.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs – pure magic. Which track is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the indomitable Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer with a voice that commands attention. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing that iconic swagger and those unmistakable vocals. What's your favourite tune from the Burnage bard?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless single 'Imagine', a powerful anthem for peace, was released on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song whose message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: A quarter of a century ago, Apple unveiled the iPod and changed music consumption forever. Who remembers their first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: October 9, 2026, marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.
